description: Offer discounts on your sports products or services with this simple Black Friday email template. Share details about your supplements or gym equipment and provide customers with a helpful discount code to ensure that they purchase from you on this busy shopping day. Beat the rush by sending this ecommerce email template earlier on in the season to your customers.

designer.description: I've started to use Photoshop when I was 13. From 2009 to 2014, I've been a part of 5 Art Groups, doing Illustrations and Photo-manipulations, collaborating with over 150 Artists from all the Planet. In 2014, during my final school's exams, I've got my first Freelance Job at a Milan based Agency. Thanks to that first project, I started my Career as a Freelance Independent UI & Web Designer. Today, I help brands improve their online and digital presence, building usable, unique & beautiful products, mostly collaborating with Italian & US Agencies and Startups.
